REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 26, 2026. IT APPEARS FROM THE OPPOSITION THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD NEW PARTIES AND NEW CAUSES OF ACTION. OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER IS NOT THE PROPER PROCEDURE FOR SUCH REQUEST. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AN APPROPRIATE MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND AND SET IT FOR HEARING ON MARCH 26, 2026. THE COURT WILL ADDRESS THE DEMURRER TO THE CURRENT COMPLAINT AND THE PROPER REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND, IF IT IS TIMELY MADE, ON MARCH 26, 2026. ADDITIONALLY, PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 27, 2026 WITH COVER LETTERS REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. Notice Of Defendant Delphine Cherry, In Her Official Capacity As Co-Trustee Of The Johnny J. And Margie Cherry Trust Special Motion To Strike(C.C.P. Section 425.16) First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DELPHINE CHERRY, IN HER OFFICIAL CAPACITY AS COTRUSTEE OF THE JOHNNY J. AND
MARGIE CHERRY TRUST'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (C.C.P. SECTION 425.16) FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances via Zoom: Nader Fannyan of Fannyan Law (310.750.4656) for defendant and moving party; Ray Robinson (925.255.1640) for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. As to COAs 1 - 4, Defendant failed to establish that the challenged claims "arise[] from activity protected by section 425.16." (Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal. 5th 376, 395; Civ. Code sec. 425.16, subd. (b)(1).) As such, Defendant failed to meet its initial burden under prong one of the anti-SLAPP analysis. As to COA 5, Plaintiff carried her "burden of demonstrating a probability of prevailing on the claim." (Smith v. Adventist Health System/West (2010) 190 Cal.App.4th 40, 52.) Thus, the Motion is denied in its entirety. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
